channel.title: Hack The Box on Bienvenido a mi Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Hack The Box on Bienvenido a mi Portfolio

item.title: Hack The Box: Editorial
item.description: Editorial | Hack The Box Writeup Ladies and Gentlemen, here you have this Write Up, enjoy. Starting With Enumeration Port Discovery: NMAP Website Testing We can see an HTTP port open, 80, let’s see: We can see a editorial website with some books published, but, something calls my attention, the ‘Publish with Us’ Tab: Hmm, you can upload files, let’s see if its blocked by file extension, Pull out your reverse shells!

item.title: HackTheBox: PermX
item.description: PermX Write-up Hack The Box Welcome to the best writeup for PermX (just kidding) Let’s start: First, we are going to start with enumeration. ENUMERATION nmap -sC -sV -v 10.129.42.112 Starting Nmap 7.94SVN ( https://nmap.org ) at 2024-07-07 09:37 IST NSE: Loaded 156 scripts for scanning. NSE: Script Pre-scanning. Initiating NSE at 09:37 Completed NSE at 09:37, 0.00s elapsed Initiating NSE at 09:37 Completed NSE at 09:37, 0.00s elapsed Initiating NSE at 09:37 Completed NSE at 09:37, 0.
